creator: andre.vandervoet@geis.ge.com
text:
I have an ACER Vuego 24X Atapi IDE cdrom on a PII 266 (Abit LX6) 
machine. The primary master has a 6.4G disc. I connected cdrom
as primary slave or as secondary master. In both cases I can boot
from cdrom, but freebsd doesnot find my cdrom device.
As secondary master it does see my disc at wdc0 but not my cdrom :
wdc1 not found 170h. Trying to set the port in "CLI" mode doesn't resolve
the problem.

Question : How do I know if the Acer is unsupported?
